zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Basset於大約1240年出生在英國越可爾查阿培爾 哈德萊時，她的父親Miles Basset47歲，母親Agnes Lascelles36歲。她於1256年之前與Nicholas Stapleton II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年在英國越可爾貝達爾享年41歲，埋葬在英國越可爾德拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Basset于大约1240年出生在英国越可爾查阿培爾 哈德萊时，她的父亲Miles Basset47岁，母亲Agnes Lascelles36岁。她于1256年之前与Nicholas Stapleton II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1280年在英国越可爾貝達爾享年41岁，埋葬在英国越可爾德拉。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Basset was born about 1240, in Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England, her father, Miles Basset, was 47 and her mother, Agnes Lascelles, was 36. She married Nicholas Stapleton II before 1256. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1280, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Drax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Basset est née environ 1240, à Chapel Haddlesey, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Miles Basset, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Agnes Lascelles, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Stapleton II avant 1256. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1280, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Drax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.North Moreton, Yorkshire, England: North Moreton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Basset um 1240 in Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Miles Basset 47 und ihre Mutter Agnes Lascelles 36. Sie hat vor 1256 Nicholas Stapleton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Bedale, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Drax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Basset è nata il circa 1240 nel Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Miles Basset, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Agnes Lascelles, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Stapleton II prima del 1256. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1280, nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Drax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Bassetが約1240年にイギリスヨークシュアイアチャペル ハッドレセイで生まれた時，父Miles Bassetは47歳，母Agnes Lascellesは36歳であった。1256年以前にNicholas Stapleton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1280年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで41歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアドラックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Basset(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 요르크실르 차플 하들레시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Miles Basset(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Lascelles(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1256년 이전 Nicholas Stapleton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 드라스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Miles Basset, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Lascelles, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Stapleton II antes 1256. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1280, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.North Moreton, Yorkshire, England: North Moreton, Berkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Basset родилась около 1240 г. в местности чапел хаддлеси, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Miles Basset было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Lascelles, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Stapleton II перед 1256 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1280 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности дракс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Basset nació aproximadamente 1240, en Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Miles Basset, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Agnes Lascelles, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Nicholas Stapleton II antes de 1256. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1280, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
